examples: The underlined word "remunerated" in the passage means "Many people believe that yellowing and wetness are the greatest enemies of stamps".
And then the warm wetness began to spread through my hair with alarming speed.
We all know that babies can generate a lot of wetness while they sleep — thus the need for a waterproof cover.
The map shown at the top of this page illustrates the wetness of soils worldwide.
At Starbucks the wetness of a drink refers to its proportion of foam to steamed milk.
